events.title: Interview - Senior Software Engineer (Emily Rodriguez)
events.location: InnovateTech Headquarters, 500 Innovation Drive, Building A, San Jose, CA 95110
events.description: On-site interview for Senior Software Engineer. Date: Thursday, February 12, 2026. Time: 1:00 PM - 3:00 PM PST. Format: On-site interview. Check in at the front desk and ask for Emily Rodriguez. Interview schedule: 1:00 PM - Technical Interview (coding); 2:00 PM - System Design Discussion; 2:45 PM - Team Fit / Q&A. What to bring: government-issued photo ID; portfolio or examples of work (optional). Parking: available in the visitor lot. Please confirm attendance by replying to the recruiting email (recruiting@innovatetech.com).
